LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 11, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 5, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE [MOVING/OPPOSITION/REPLY] PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO PTLF'S COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEPARTMENT 302. TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JULY 11, 2014. (SEE SFLR 8.10.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DEPT. 501: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN JULY 30, 2014 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: LILLIAN K. SING; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 1 & 2. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PLEAD WITH SPECIFICITY WHEN THE ALLEGED CONVERSATION WITH CHASE'S AGENT "MARSHA" OCCURRED; SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE TENDER OR EXCEPTION TO TENDER; SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSE OF ACTIONS 1 THROUGH 3 AS DESCRIBED ABOVE, TO SHOW VALIDLY PLED UNDERLYING VIOLATIONS TO SUPPORT A B&P 17200 CLAIM; SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING THE ALLEGATION THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH INTENT TO INFLICT EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Continued To Nov-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to cause of actions 1 & 2. Plaintiff fails to plead with specificity when the alleged conversation with Chase's agent "Marsha" occurred; SUSTAINED as to cause of action 3, with leave to amend to allege tender or exception to tender; SUSTAINED as to cause of action 4, with leave to amend cause of actions 1 through 3 as described above, to show validly pled underlying violations to support a B&P 17200 claim; SUSTAINED as to cause of action 5, with leave to amend to plead facts supporting the allegation that Defendant acted with intent to inflict emotional distress. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to August 14, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than July 30, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 11, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 5, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the [moving/opposition/reply] papers. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
